pages.title: Paper That Cut You
pages.tagline: Paper That Cut You: Internalize The Noise.

pages.body: Step into a world where paranoia becomes your own worst enemy. This track fuses early-2000s rap-rock bounce with modern industrial production to create a mid-tempo groove driven by heavy live drums, distorted guitar stabs, and sub-bass pressure. Aggressive turntable scratches glitch out against pitch drops as the narrator battles an inner voice that wounds from within. The journey moves from eerie whispers of self-dimmed reality to explosive rock aggression where you confront the shadow at your back. It is a psychological warfare anthem about teaching fear to lie and breathing right under someone's skin, proving that sometimes the darkest voices are the ones we invited in ourselves.
pages.styleSentence: A high-energy fusion of early-2000s rap-rock bounce and modern industrial production featuring a mid-tempo (100 BPM) groove driven by heavy live drums, distorted guitar stabs, sub-bass pressure, and aggressive turntable scratches with glitch edits and pitch drops.

pages.text:
[Intro - Glitched Whisper]
You asked why it feels like night today
I was the one who dimmed the room
You asked what wasn’t right today
I was already moving through you

[Scratch]
Cut—cut—cut you

[Verse 1 - Rap]
You asked why the night came early
I pulled the shade across the sky
You asked what felt wrong inside you
I was teaching fear to lie

You asked why your chest stayed tightened
I kept my hand around the thread
You didn’t know what stressed you first
I fed the pressure in your head

You know what the voice feels like
Because I learned how to speak low
In the back of every thought
Where the quiet things grow

I’m the face that you hold inside
I wake up when your eyes close
I watch every little lie
And laugh when your balance goes

I see everything
Every crack you hide within
When it’s time to sink or swim
I breathe right under your skin

[Pre-Chorus - Sung]
You keep looking back
But I was never far behind
You keep hearing storms
Because I spin them in your mind

[Chorus - Rock Vocal]
I know why you’re paranoid
I’m the shadow at your back
I know why your head keeps spinning
I’m the wind inside the static

I know why you hear me within
I’m the voice you can’t undo
I know why the face is near
I’m the paper that cut you

[Post-Chorus - Chopped]
Cut you
Cut you
Paper that cut you
Still beneath
Still beneath
Still beneath your skin

[Verse 2 - Rap]
You said you’ve got a face in you
I know, I carved it carefully
Pointing out mistakes to you
Was the way I made you carry me

You said we all have one inside
Now you’re finally speaking true
But the face you fear in everyone
Is learning tricks from you

You asked what set you off first
I was there before the spark
You asked why you can’t stand it
I was whispering in the dark

They act like you don’t measure up
So I sharpen every doubt
I turn every little comparison
Into something you can’t get out

Everybody has a face inside
A watcher in the wires
A witness when the truth gets bent
A laugh beneath the fire

So when they sink or swim
They’ll feel what you’ve been through
The face inside is watching them
The way I watched you too

[Pre-Chorus - Sung]
You keep looking back
But I was never far behind
You keep hearing storms
Because I spin them in your mind

[Chorus - Rock Vocal]
I know why you’re paranoid
I’m the shadow at your back
I know why your head keeps spinning
I’m the wind inside the static

I know why you hear me within
I’m the voice you can’t undo
I know why the face is near
I’m the paper that cut you

[Interlude - Whisper Chant]
The cut is right beneath your skin
The cut is right beneath your skin
The cut is right beneath your skin

[Bridge - Sung/Screamed]
When the sun goes down
I’m the reason light feels guilty
When the sun goes down
I make the daylight turn against you

When the sun goes down
I’m the grin behind the evening
When the sun goes down
I make the mirror sing back to you

[Breakdown - Voice vs Singer]
[Voice]
You asked who was watching

[Singer]
You were

[Voice]
You asked what was laughing

[Singer]
You were

[Voice]
You asked why it followed

[Singer]
You moved

[Voice]
You asked what was inside

[Singer]
Not you

[Voice]
You don’t sing me

[Singer]
I remix you

[Scratch Solo]
Cut you
Cut you
Paper that cut you

[Final Chorus - Explosive]
I know why you’re paranoid
I’m the shadow at your back
I know why your head keeps spinning
I’m the wind inside the static

I know why you hear me within
I’m the voice you can’t undo
I know why the face is near
I’m the paper that cut you

I know why you’re paranoid
I’m the warning in the room
I know why the light betrays
I was standing next to you

I know why you can’t stop hearing
What I buried deep within
I know why the face is near
I’m still beneath your skin

[Outro - Glitched Whisper]
You asked why it feels like night today
Now you know
You asked what wasn’t right today
Now you know

[Scratch]
Cut—cut—cut you
Good night

pages.caption: A glitched industrial wasteland where shadows spin inside static minds amidst heavy bass pressure and distorted guitar stabs.

pages.vocalStyle: Anxious male rap verses alternating with explosive rock chorus vocals and tense inner-voice whispers

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Channels anxious male rap verses with explosive rock chorus vocals.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Delivers chaotic looping patterns that drive frantic denial forward.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Applies sub-bass pressure deep inside every thought and feeling.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Generates glitch edits and pitch drops for mental distortion effects.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Layers aggressive scratches to create a paranoid industrial atmosphere.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Dismantles calm with distorted stabs that cut like paper.
